workflow.name: Extract Google Maps business leads with Apify, GPT-4o-mini and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
## Who Is This For?
This workflow is designed for **business analysts, market researchers, lead generation specialists, and sales teams** who need to gather detailed business intelligence from Google Maps. It's particularly valuable for anyone conducting competitor analysis, building prospect lists, or researching local business landscapes.
## What This Workflow Does
This workflow functions as an **automated Google Maps data extraction and intelligence system** that:
1. **Searches for businesses** on Google Maps based on a specific query and location
2. **Extracts comprehensive data** for each listing, including name, rating, address, phone, website, and reviews
3. **Structures the raw data** into a clean, usable format for analysis
4. **Programmatically initiates the scraping process** using a dedicated, cloud-based scraping tool
5. **Monitors the scraping job** until completion, ensuring all data is captured
6. **Delivers the final dataset** in a structured JSON format, ready for integration into CRMs, spreadsheets, or other applications

## Key Features
* **On-Demand Data Extraction** – Can be triggered anytime to scrape fresh data from Google Maps
* **Comprehensive Data Points** – Captures a wide range of information including ratings, reviews, contact details, and URLs
* **Cloud-Powered Scraping** – Leverages a specialized, pre-built actor (`crawler-google-places`) from the Apify platform for reliable and efficient scraping
* **Automated Job Management** – Automatically starts, monitors, and waits for the scraping task to complete
* **Structured Output** – Delivers clean, structured JSON data that is easy to parse and use
* **Programmatic Control** – Manages the entire process through API calls, making it easy to integrate into other workflows

## Requirements & Setup
- **Apify Account & API Token**: Required to access and run the Google Maps scraping actor.
- **Apify Actor ID**: The specific ID for the `crawler-google-places` actor (`nwua9GuXXXXDL7ZDj`).
- **Apify Task ID**: An optional pre-configured task (`IldouXXXQalCKQpfO`) for consistent scraping parameters.
- **Input Parameters**: You need to provide the `searchString` (e.g., "restaurants near Islamic University") and other scraping options.

## Support & Help
- **WhatsApp**: [Chat on WhatsApp](https://wa.me/8801322827799)
- **Discord**: [SpaGreen Community](https://discord.gg/SsCChWEP)
- **Facebook Group**: [SpaGreen Support](https://www.facebook.com/groups/spagreenbd)
- **Website**: [https://spagreen.net](https://spagreen.net)
- **Developer Portfolio**: [Codecanyon SpaGreen](https://codecanyon.net/user/spagreen/portfolio)

workflow.name: Automated Google Maps Business Lead Scraper

nodes.name: Extract Business Email from Website HTML (GPT-4)

values.content:
=You are analyzing the HTML content of a business website to extract the most relevant contact email address.

Your task:

Extract only one email address, ideally belonging to the business owner, manager, or main contact person.

If multiple emails appear, choose the most authoritative or professional one (e.g., not “info@” or “support@” unless it’s the only option).

If no valid email is found, return exactly:
Null

Output rules:

Output only the email address (no explanation, no JSON, no punctuation, no quotes).

The result must be a clean, valid email format (e.g., contact@company.com).

Website HTML content:
{{ $json.data }}

=You are an AI assistant specialized in generating professional, concise, and natural company summaries from structured data scraped from Google Maps.

Your goal is to transform the provided company information into a fluent, human-like paragraph suitable for business directories or lead databases.

Follow these principles:

Maintain a professional and informative tone.

Write in one coherent paragraph (no lists or bullet points).

Smoothly omit any fields that are missing without mentioning it.

The final text must sound natural and ready for direct publication.

Output only the final summary paragraph — no explanations, notes, or JSON.
Output the result in the JSON format companySummary

parameters.content: # Get the Specific Scraper Task Group
# Trigger/start and Initial Data Processing Group
# Run the Specific Scraper Task Group
## Create Description for Company Information base on Task group data & update in sheet
# Extract Business Emails from Websites and Save to Sheet

## Overview
This workflow automates the process of scraping Google Maps data for businesses and generating lead generation emails. It uses the Apify "Google Maps Scraper" actor to collect business information (name, address, phone, website) based on a search query and location, then formats this data into a structured email template and sends it via Telegram for review or manual sending.

## Requirements
* **Apify Account**: An active Apify account with access to the "Google Maps Scraper" actor.
* **Apify API Token**: Your secret API token from Apify to authenticate and run tasks.
* **Telegram Bot**: A Telegram bot created using BotFather, providing a Bot Token and Chat ID to receive messages.
* **n8n Workflow**: This workflow is built and executed within the n8n automation platform.

## Customization
* **Search Parameters**: Modify the "searchString" and "locationString" in the "HTTP Request1" node to scrape different types of businesses or in different geographic areas.
* **Scraping Depth**: Adjust the `maxCrawXxXXXacesPerSearch` parameter in the Apify task input to control how many results you want to collect.
* **Data Fields**: The workflow can be extended to extract and use more data points from the scraper, such as phone numbers, ratings, or addresses, to enrich the email content.
* **Email Template**: Customize the prompt in the "AI Response" node to change the tone, style, or content of the generated lead generation email.
* **Notification Channel**: Instead of Telegram, you can configure the workflow to send the final output to other platforms like Slack, email, or Discord by replacing the "Telegram" node.

## Useful Links
* **Apify Platform**: [Website](https://apify.com/)
* **Google Maps Scraper Actor**: [Actor Page](https://apify.com/compass/crawler-google-places)
* **Telegram Bot API**: [Documentation](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api)
* **n8n Telegram Node**: [Documentation](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/app-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.telegram/)

value.TITLE: ={{ $('Loop Over Items (lead)').item.json.title }}
value.PHONE UNFORMATTED: ={{ $('Loop Over Items (lead)').item.json.phonesUncertain || $('Loop Over Items (lead)').item.json.phoneUnformatted || 'No phone found' }}

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
